## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the issue it closes, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

Closes #

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## The one non-negotiable: tests ship with the code
<!-- CI refuses to merge if a declared-required test is missing. See CONTRIBUTING.md#testing-policy -->
- [ ] I added/updated tests for this change (or it's docs-only)
- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test` passes locally
- [ ] If I touched a module's capabilities, MCP parity still holds (`pnpm check:mcp-parity`)

## Anything reviewers should know?

<!-- Screenshots for UI changes are very welcome. -->
